title: quercus ilex var. obovatifolia
intro: Quercus ilex var. obovatifolia, also known as the cork oak, is a variety of evergreen tree that belongs to the Quercus ilex species. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. obovatifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the leaves and bark being the most commonly used parts.
